'''Shalk''' was the son of [[Jintar]] and [[Dinua Jeban]] and the brother of [[Briila]]. Both Shalk and Briila witnessed the awakening of [[Sintas Vel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
